transcript: Speaker A: Madam, need holiday two days madam. [Madam, I need a holiday for two days, Madam.] Speaker B: Lokesh, nenu neeku English nerchukomani one month time ichaanu. Inka ade problem-aa? [Lokesh, I gave you one month to learn English. Is it still the same problem?] Speaker A: Madam, offline courses, YouTube anni try chesaanu... Kaani yedhi improvement ledu madam. [Madam, I tried offline courses, YouTube, everything... but there is no improvement, Madam.] Speaker B: Choodu Lokesh, neeku ippudu SpeakX App chaala avasaram. [Look Lokesh, you really need the SpeakX App now.] Speaker A: Ma'am, SpeakX app? [Ma'am, SpeakX app?] Speaker B: Nee seniors andaru ee app lone English nerchukunnaru. Daily 15 to 20 minutes isthe chaalu, practice chesi maatladadam nerchukovachu. Ee app lo AI English teacher untundi. Free time lo teacher tho kalisi practice cheyochu. [All your seniors learned English in this app. Just 15 to 20 minutes daily is enough, you can practice and learn to speak. In this app, there is an AI English teacher. You can practice with the teacher in your free time.] Speaker A: AI Teacher? [AI Teacher?] Speaker B: Avunu, nuvvu chese prathi mistake ventane correct chestundi. Nee daily office conversations, grammar, sentence formation, anni 20 days lo nerpinchestundi. [Yes, it corrects every mistake you make instantly. It will teach you daily office conversations, grammar, sentence formation, everything in 20 days.] Speaker A: Madam, karidhu ekkuva untunda? [Madam, is it very expensive?] Speaker B: Karchu kaadu, chaala affordable. Just 2 rupees per day, 7 day trial dorukutundi. Ee rojullo English leka pothe respect kuda ledhu, money kuda raadhu. [Not expensive, very affordable. Just 2 rupees per day, 7-day trial is available. These days, without English, there is no respect and no money.] Speaker A: Thank you madam, ippude nenu SpeakX app download chestanu. [Thank you madam, I will download the SpeakX app right now.]
on_screen_text: Madam, need holiday two days madam. Lokesh, Nenu neeku English nerchukomani one month time ichaanu. Inka ade problem aa? Madam, Offline courses, YouTube anni try chesaanu... Kaani yedhi improvement ledu. Choodu Lokesh, Neeku ippudu SpeakX App chaala avasaram. Ma'am, SpeakX app? Nee seniors andaru ee app lone English nerchukunnaru. Daily 15 to 20 minutes isthe chaalu, Practice chesi maatladadam nerchukovachu. Ee app lo AI English teacher untundi. Free time lo teacher tho kalisi practice cheyochu. AI Teacher? Avunu, Nuvvu chese prathi mistake ventane correct chestundi. Nee daily office conversations, Grammar, sentence formation, Anni 20 days lo nerpinchestundi. Madam, karidhu ekkuva untunda? Karchu kaadu, chaala affordable. Just 2 rupees per day 7 day trail dorukutundi. ee rojulo English leka pota respect kuda ledhu money kuda radhu. Thankyou madam Eppude nanu Speakx app download chestamu
summary: An employee struggles to request leave in correct English, prompting his boss to recommend the SpeakX app. She explains that the app features an AI English teacher that corrects mistakes instantly and helps improve office communication skills in 20 days. The ad highlights the app's affordability at just 2 rupees per day with a 7-day trial, motivating the employee to download it immediately.
